test.command: pnpm exec vitest run ui/src/ packages/orchestrator-tui/ --max-workers=3

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/tui-architecture.md to document SettingsOverlay, current App layout dimensions, and Codex protocol naming (`serviceTier` JSON-RPC vs `service_tier` config).
Updated .factory/library/architecture.md TUI section to include settings overlay and StatusBar model controls, plus the fast-mode protocol naming detail.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Adjust .factory/skills/tui-worker/SKILL.md to either enforce strict tests-first sequencing (with explicit audit criteria) or explicitly allow justified exceptions, and align validator expectations for TUI-only features so handoff `followedProcedure` is evaluated consistently.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for tui-reasoning-effort and tui-settings-overlay both observed implementation edits before tests and handoffs marking followedProcedure=true despite procedure mismatch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify Codex fast-mode naming in mission/operator guidance: use `serviceTier` for JSON-RPC thread/turn params and `service_tier` for config file fields.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: tui-fast-mode review flagged ambiguity where guidance referenced `service_tier` as a thread param, while protocol schemas and client calls use `serviceTier`.

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate report of TUI skill procedure drift from multiple feature reviews.
Duplicate report that TUI architecture knowledge was stale across multiple feature reviews.
